calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: S.Vantree, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Mark T. Cefalu, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Bnak of The West.

No appearance by defaulted defendants Cleaners4Less, LLC and Hedieh Mansoori.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $263,090.94
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $4,500.00
Costs: $1,530.22
Total Judgment in the amount of $269,121.16
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Set For Case Management Conference On Dec-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Set For Trial On Sep-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRADLEY M. MATTEONI OF MATTEONI & HECHTMAN, TEL. NO. (408) 293-4300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LOUIE TSIGARIS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is granted. Plaintiff failed to substitute serve defendant in compliance with CCP 415.20(b). Defendant shall file an answer to the complaint by September 25, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
